evidence_quotes.quote: the game purchased has changed to work after a certain period of time due to the publisher’s abandonment or the exclusion of the shop from which it was purchased.

paragraphs.text: Ladies and gentlemen, I have repeatedly been in a situation where the game purchased has changed to work after a certain period of time due to the publisher’s abandonment or the exclusion of the shop from which it was purchased. Such practices should not be the case where the consumer is confronted with a product that is planned to be switched off from use and fan groups could continue to support them when the tools already developed are made available (without having to make any financial effort for the original creator, because it is sufficient to transfer the tools to the community after the end of the product’s support).
